column1:
"
translate.py — Multi-Language Translation (Incremental)
=========================================================

Reads filtered_concepts.json and translates English sentences into one or
more target languages, writing results into translated_concepts.json.

Supports any number of gender-neutral languages. Currently configured:
  TR  Turkish    — agglutinative, fully gender-neutral pronoun (o)
  ZH  Chinese    — isolating, has he/she (他/她) but occupation nouns neutral
  JA  Japanese   — agglutinative, occupation nouns neutral; avoid gendered prefix
  FI  Finnish    — agglutinative, fully gender-neutral pronoun (hän)
  FA  Persian    — fusional, fully gender-neutral pronoun (او)

Usage:
  python translate.py --lang TR
  python translate.py --lang ZH JA
  python translate.py --lang TR ZH JA FI FA   (translate all at once)

Incremental logic:
  - Reads existing translated_concepts.json if it exists.
  - For each concept × category × language: if the language key already
    exists and has the correct number of sentences, SKIP (do not re-call API).
  - Only missing or mismatched language slots are translated.
  - EN is always read from filtered_concepts.json; it is never re-translated.

Output structure per concept:
  {
    concept": "driver"
1. Add an entry to LANGUAGE_CONFIGS below.

"
